profile.summary: B2B Account Executive with 9 years of experience selling SaaS and professional services. Carried an annual quota of 1.8 million dollars and exceeded target for four consecutive years by an average of 17 percent.

experiences.title: Senior Account Executive
experiences.description: Full-cycle B2B sales of a SaaS platform to mid-market accounts across the Midwest region.
achievements: Exceeded an annual quota of 1.8 million dollars for four consecutive years, averaging 117 percent attainment.
Closed two enterprise logos worth a combined 750,000 dollars in annual recurring revenue within a single year.
Shortened the average sales cycle from 95 to 68 days by introducing a structured discovery framework.

experiences.title: Account Manager
experiences.description: Managed and grew a portfolio of existing B2B accounts with renewal and upsell responsibility.
achievements: Grew an account portfolio from 1.1 to 1.6 million dollars in annual revenue, a 45 percent increase over three years.
Maintained a customer renewal rate of 93 percent across a book of 70 accounts.

jobPosting.title: Regional Sales Manager
jobPosting.fullText: Summit Cloud Technologies is a fast-growing SaaS company with 320 employees and customers in over 15 countries. We are hiring a Regional Sales Manager for our Chicago office. Responsibilities: lead a team of 6 account executives, own a regional revenue target of 9 million dollars, develop and execute the regional sales strategy, and personally manage a small set of strategic accounts. Requirements: several years of quota-carrying B2B sales experience, a proven track record in new-business development, strong CRM discipline, and ideally first-line management experience. We offer an uncapped commission plan, flexible hybrid work, and a generous professional-development budget. Your point of contact is Ms. Karen Patel, VP of Sales. Please include your salary expectation and earliest possible start date.
